attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8, "i": "panel_0"}, "panelIndex": "panel_0", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_0"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 12, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8, "i": "panel_1"}, "panelIndex": "panel_1", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_1"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8, "i": "panel_2"}, "panelIndex": "panel_2", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_2"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 36, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8, "i": "panel_3"}, "panelIndex": "panel_3", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_3"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 48, "h": 18, "i": "panel_4"}, "panelIndex": "panel_4", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_4"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 32, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_5"}, "panelIndex": "panel_5", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_5"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 32, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_6"}, "panelIndex": "panel_6", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_6"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 46, "w": 48, "h": 14, "i": "panel_7"}, "panelIndex": "panel_7", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_7"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 60, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_8"}, "panelIndex": "panel_8", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_8"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 60, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_9"}, "panelIndex": "panel_9", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_9"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "type": "visualization", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 48, "h": 6, "i": "panel_10"}, "panelIndex": "panel_10", "embeddableConfig": {"savedVis": {"title": "", "description": "", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "## 🚨 SOC L1 Alert Triage Console
**Time**: Last 4 hours · **Auto-refresh**: 30s · **Persona**: L1 analyst on shift

**Triage workflow** (Splunk ES-inspired):
1. Row 1 KPIs → nếu **Critical > 0** hoặc **Aging > 0** = ưu tiên ngay
2. Row 2 Notable Events → chọn row có **Max Level ≥ 12** hoặc **First seen > 30 min ago** (SLA breach)
3. Row 3 Attack Chain → host với **Distinct Techniques ≥ 3** = likely compromise chain, ESCALATE L2
4. Row 5 IOC watchlist → block IP/hash malicious ngay
5. Row 6 Endpoint Heartbeat → agent **last event > 1h ago** = check tampering
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"language": "kuery", "query": ""}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"version": "2.13.0", "type": "visualization", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 74, "w": 48, "h": 16, "i": "panel_11"}, "panelIndex": "panel_11", "embeddableConfig": {"savedVis": {"title": "", "description": "", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### 📖 Runbook References per Technique

| MITRE | Rule | Playbook |
|---|---|---|
| T1059.001 PowerShell | 100101 | [session-01 report](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-01-T1059.001.md) — decode base64, kill parent |
| T1547.001 Run Key | 100108 | [session-02](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-02-T1547.001.md) — `reg query HKU\<SID>\...\Run`, backup hive |
| T1053.005 Scheduled Task | 100104 | [session-03](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-03-T1053.005.md) — `schtasks /query /xml`, decode taskContent |
| T1087.001 Discovery | 100105/100115 | [session-04](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-04-T1087.001.md) — correlate với other techniques |
| T1003.008 Shadow read | 100100/100120 | [session-05](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-05-T1003.008.md) — **rotate ALL passwords** |
| T1543.003 Service Create | 100102/100112 | [session-06](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-06-T1543.003.md) — check LOLBIN binary |
| T1021.002 SMB Lateral | 100103/100106 | [session-07](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-07-T1021.002-T1550.002.md) — block SMB port 445 |
| T1562.001 Disable Defender | 100107 | [session-08](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-08-T1562.001.md) — re-enable, scan full |
| T1074.001 Data Staging | 100109/100119 | [session-09](https://github.com/gnid31/blue-team-lab/blob/main/hunting-reports/session-09-T1074.001.md) — sensor gap (WIP) |

**Escalation**: cần deep-dive → [DFIR Workbench](#/dashboards/view/btl-dfir)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"language": "kuery", "query": ""}, "filter": []}}}}}]

attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 48, "h": 20, "i": "panel_0"}, "panelIndex": "panel_0", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_0"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 26, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "panel_1"}, "panelIndex": "panel_1", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_1"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 26, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "panel_2"}, "panelIndex": "panel_2", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_2"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 32, "y": 26, "w": 16, "h": 14, "i": "panel_3"}, "panelIndex": "panel_3", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_3"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 40, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_4"}, "panelIndex": "panel_4", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_4"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 40, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "panel_5"}, "panelIndex": "panel_5", "embeddableConfig": {}, "panelRefName": "panel_5"}, {"version": "2.13.0", "type": "visualization", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 48, "h": 6, "i": "panel_6"}, "panelIndex": "panel_6", "embeddableConfig": {"savedVis": {"title": "", "description": "", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "## DFIR Investigation Scope Filters

**Persona**: DFIR analyst. Manual time picker theo incident window. No auto-refresh (freeze snapshot).

**Filter shortcuts** (paste vào query bar trên):
- Host: `agent.name : "win-ep-01"`
- User: `data.win.eventdata.user : *labuser*` (Win) hoặc `data.audit.auid : "1000"` (Linux)
- Technique: `rule.mitre.id : "T1059.001"`
- Hash: `data.win.eventdata.hashes : *B4E7BC24*`
- IP: `data.win.eventdata.destinationIp : "192.168.154.166"`
- Path: `data.win.eventdata.targetFilename : *"\\Temp\\"*`

Combine với `and`: `agent.name : "win-ep-01" and data.win.eventdata.user : *labuser*`
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"language": "kuery", "query": ""}, "filter": []}}}}}]
